title: diasperus kipareh
intro: Diasperus kipareh, also known as the Dipterocarpus kipareh, is a plant species native to the tropical forests of Southeast Asia. It is a type of tree that belongs to the family Dipterocarpaceae. The medicinal properties of Diasperus kipareh lie in its bark, which is used to treat various health issues, including fever, inflammation, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Diasperus kipareh include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to reduce pain and prevent infections, and it is often prepared as a herbal tea or infusion.
